mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pipeline_execution (id, ticket_id, pipeline_definition_id, status, started_at, trace_parent, parameters_json, context_json, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{ticketId}, #{pipelineDefinitionId}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{traceParent}, #{parametersJson}, #{contextJson}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, ticket_id, pipeline_definition_id, status, started_at, completed_at, error_message, trace_parent, parameters_json, context_json, created_at FROM pipeline_execution WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, ticket_id, pipeline_definition_id, status, started_at, completed_at, error_message, trace_parent, parameters_json, context_json, created_at FROM pipeline_execution WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, ticket_id, pipeline_definition_id, status, started_at, completed_at, error_message, trace_parent, parameters_json, context_json, created_at FROM pipeline_execution WHERE pipeline_definition_id = #{pipelineDefinitionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, ticket_id, pipeline_definition_id, status, started_at, completed_at, error_message, trace_parent, parameters_json, context_json, created_at FROM pipeline_execution WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at
